description: Application performance monitoring, error tracking, log aggregation, and uptime monitoring services.

entries.name: Sentry
entries.summary: Error tracking and performance monitoring across web, mobile, and backend stacks with rich stack-trace context.
entries.freeTier: 5,000 errors/month, 1 team member, 1 project on free Developer plan.

entries.name: Better Stack (formerly Better Uptime / Logtail)
entries.summary: Combined uptime monitoring, incident management, and log management platform with on-call alerting.
entries.freeTier: Free tier covers limited monitors, log volume, and status pages.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans scale with monitors/log volume.

entries.name: UptimeRobot
entries.summary: Simple uptime monitoring with email/SMS alerts and public status pages.

entries.name: Grafana Cloud
entries.summary: Managed Grafana, Prometheus (metrics), Loki (logs), and Tempo (traces) for full-stack observability.
entries.freeTier: Free tier includes 10k metrics series, 50GB logs, 50GB traces per month.
entries.paidFrom: Pro plan billed on usage beyond free quota.

entries.name: New Relic
entries.summary: Full-stack observability platform covering APM, infrastructure, logs, and browser/mobile monitoring.
entries.freeTier: 100GB data ingest/month free, one full-access user.

entries.name: Datadog
entries.summary: Comprehensive monitoring platform for infrastructure, APM, logs, security, and synthetic testing.
entries.freeTier: Free tier for up to 5 hosts with 1-day metric retention.

entries.name: LogRocket
entries.summary: Session replay combined with frontend error/performance monitoring to see exactly what users experienced.

entries.name: Highlight.io
entries.summary: Open-source session replay, error monitoring, and logging platform, self-hostable or cloud-managed.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with limited monthly sessions and log/error events.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans scale with session/event volume.

entries.name: Checkly
entries.summary: Synthetic monitoring and API/E2E testing built on Playwright, with monitoring-as-code workflows.
entries.freeTier: Free tier includes limited check runs/month.
entries.paidFrom: Team plan billed on check volume.

entries.name: PagerDuty
entries.summary: Incident response and on-call alerting platform integrating with most monitoring tools.
entries.freeTier: Free tier for up to 5 users with basic on-call scheduling.

entries.name: OpenTelemetry
entries.summary: Vendor-neutral open-source standard and SDKs for collecting traces, metrics, and logs across services.
entries.freeTier: Fully free and open source; pairs with any backend (Jaeger, Prometheus, Grafana, vendor platforms).

entries.name: Jaeger
entries.summary: Open-source, self-hosted distributed tracing system originally built by Uber, CNCF graduated project.
